additional_advanced_model_training.resource_limits: sklearn dependency-safe ensemble; no model artifact persisted

mlp_training.architecture_summary: sklearn MLPRegressor hidden_layer_sizes=(64, 32), relu, adam, early_stopping=True

p0054c_old_vs_new_weather_comparison.comparison_type: evidence-summary comparison; old P0054C south_connected_weather vs new P0054D se4_load_weather
p0054c_old_vs_new_weather_comparison.interpretation: Corrected weather materially changes the P0054C MLP-vs-HGB picture: MLP no longer has the broad-weather penalty, but ExtraTrees is the strongest corrected-proxy model.

split_policy.fixed_cet_rule: model_cet_timestamp = timestamp_utc + 1h all year; calendar feature only
